items.title: Photos: Felix Rosenqvist Celebrates Sweet Indy 500 Victory With Milk
items.summary: How sweet it is! Felix Rosenqvist celebrates his historic Indy 500 victory with the iconic milk toast in Winner's Circle.

items.title: How 'electric' Watkins forced his way back into Tuchel's England
items.summary: Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Wayne Rooney praise Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins on his "unbelievable" hot streak since he was left out of the England squad in March.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
